summary: Local Communities Feature - Backend Testing COMPLETE. 33/33 tests PASS. All community endpoints verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Community models correctly defined (Community, CommunityMember, CommunityJoinRequest, CommunityRequest) at lines 500-560
✓ Admin community routes properly protected with require_admin dependency
✓ Case-insensitive community code matching using regex with $options: 'i'
✓ 409 Conflict response correctly returns switch prompt with current/new community info
✓ Local frikt posting correctly enforces community membership (403 if not in community)
✓ Local frikt automatically sets community_id from user's membership
✓ Global feed (new/trending/foryou) correctly excludes local frikts with is_local != true filter
✓ Local feed requires community_id parameter (400 if missing)
✓ Local feed supports sort_by: new, top, trending
✓ Relate endpoint restricts local frikt relates to community members only (403 for non-members)
✓ Similar problems search is context-aware (global vs local based on is_local and community_id params)
✓ Comments endpoint adds is_community_member flag for local frikts
✓ Admin export endpoint generates structured text with frikt details and comments
✓ Frontend API service has all community methods implemented
seed_data_creation: Test communities created during tests with prefixes: TEST-, DUP-, OLD-, NEW-, USER-, SEC-, SWT-, LOC-, REL-. These can be cleaned up via admin panel.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Local Communities feature fully implemented and backend verified. 33 comprehensive tests cover: admin community CRUD, user join/switch/leave operations, community listing with stats, community/join requests, local frikt posting with membership enforcement, global feed exclusion of local frikts, local feed filtering and sorting, relate restrictions for local frikts, context-aware similar problems search. Existing test communities in DB: Melbourne CBD (MELB-CBD-2), Sydney North (SYD-N), plus test communities created during testing.

features_verified.GET_api_admin_communities: PASS - Admin lists all communities with stats (member_count, frikt_count, pending_join_requests)

features_verified.POST_api_communities_id_request_join: PASS - Submit join request for a community

features_verified.GET_api_problems_feed_new: PASS - Global feed excludes local frikts
features_verified.GET_api_problems_feed_local: PASS - Local feed returns only community frikts
features_verified.GET_api_problems_feed_local_sort_new: PASS - Local feed sort by new
features_verified.GET_api_problems_feed_local_sort_top: PASS - Local feed sort by top
